headline: Hedge Funds Were Loading Up On This Cathie Wood Stock For 2026
summary: Teradyne (NASDAQ:TER) is one of the Cathie Wood 2026 Portfolio: 10 Best Stocks to Buy. Automated test equipment and robotics company Teradyne (NASDAQ:TER) ranks ninth in our list of the best stocks to buy for 2026 according to Cathie Wood. ARK has a $456.08 million stake in Teradyne (NASDAQ:TER) as of the end of December. […]

headline: Teradyne Introduces Photon 100
summary: NORTH READING, Mass., March 17, 2026--Teradyne announces Photon 100, a comprehensive opto-electric automated test platform for high-volume silicon photonics and co-packaged optics.
